summary: Iteration 10 (seed users removed everywhere + per-comment Nice reaction + quick-insert 'Nice!' button) fully verified end-to-end. Ran the 5 author-supplied tests in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration10.py plus 4 additional tests I added in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration10_extra.py (likes/friends seed filtering, auth/sync no-auto-like, 404 on missing comment). All 9 backend tests green. Then signed up a fresh TEST_i10ui_* Firebase user via the public preview UI and exercised Discovery + comment Nice toggle + quick-insert flows end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: PostInteractions.jsx::toggleCommentNice — optimistic update flips both `preview` and `comments` lists, then reconciles with server response. Rollback path also flips both lists. Confirmed live: aria-pressed and count update instantly on click and remain consistent after server reply.

PostInteractions.jsx::insertNicePhrase clamps to 500 chars (maxLength on the input is also 500). Confirmed it appends 'Nice! 🥏' on empty AND on non-empty input ('great catch' → 'great catch Nice! 🥏').
comment-nice-count-{id} element is only rendered when nice_count > 0 — verified that toggling off cleanly removes the count chip (no '(0)' lingering).

Backend `_attach_comment_reactions` is wired into BOTH /api/feed (recent_comments) and GET /api/posts/{post_id}/comments. The author of a comment sees liked_by_me=false unless they themselves tapped — confirmed by test_feed_carries_comment_reactions.
POST .../nice returns 404 for a junk comment id (confirmed by test_comment_nice_returns_404_for_missing_comment).

Seed filtering verified on 4 surfaces: /api/discovery, /api/inbox.incoming_likes, /api/likes, /api/friends. Each test inserts a is_seed=true user (and for likes/friends also inserts a mutual swipe + friends row) and asserts they never surface.

auth/sync regression covered: signing up a fresh TEST_i10sync_* user now yields an empty incoming_likes list (no seed-* uids appended). The removed ensure_inbound_likes_for call is confirmed gone in behavior.

Minor (no action): /api/likes shape is loose — my test flattens any list-of-dicts under the top-level object to look for uids. If the schema ever tightens this should keep working; if you want a stricter assertion later, lock it to the known key (e.g. mutual_likes).

success_rate.backend: 100% — 9/9 tests passed (5 in test_iteration10.py + 4 in test_iteration10_extra.py)
success_rate.frontend: 100% — Discovery had 0 seed cards (Sarah/Jessica/Amanda/demo-unsplash all absent across 24 rendered cards); comment Nice toggle + count + quick-insert all behaved per spec on the live preview URL

test_credentials: Ephemeral Firebase Identity Toolkit signups created and deleted in-test: TEST_i10a_*/TEST_i10b_*/TEST_i10x_*/TEST_i10sync_*@example.com / demo1234 (backend tests); TEST_i10ui_<hex>@example.com / demo1234 used live via UI signup (left in DB — disposable test acct).
seed_data_creation: Each backend test that needs a seed user inserts its own `seed-i10*-<hex>` users.is_seed=true row (plus swipes/friends rows where needed) via the db.get_db() helper and tears them down on fixture teardown — no persistent seed data added.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter-10 selectors verified live on https://frisbee-favorites.preview.emergentagent.com: comments-toggle-{postId}, comments-section-{postId}, comment-input-{postId}, comment-insert-nice-{postId} (quick-insert), comment-submit-{postId}, comment-{commentId} (full thread row), comment-preview-{commentId} (3-row preview), comment-nice-btn-{commentId} (aria-pressed reflects liked_by_me; label flips between 'Nice' and 'Nice ✓'), comment-nice-count-{commentId} (ONLY mounted when nice_count > 0 — DO NOT assert presence at zero). Quick-insert text token is the literal 'Nice! 🥏' (U+1F94F flying disc emoji). Discovery now filters is_seed=true server-side; test by signing up a fresh user and confirming names 'Sarah/Jessica/Amanda' + the seed unsplash url 'images.unsplash.com/photo-1494790108377-be9c29b29330' never appear. Pre-existing failures in /app/backend/tests/test_api.py and /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py that depend on seed-sarah/jessica/amanda are explicitly OUT OF SCOPE per main agent — do not chase them.
rca of the issue: User report ('Remove placeholder cards in discovery — real users only across the app + add Nice button to comments') is FULLY RESOLVED on production code path. Backend changes verified: discovery_router/social_router/auth_router/posts_router all behave per spec. Frontend changes verified: PostInteractions.jsx wires the per-comment Nice button into both the 3-comment preview and the expanded thread AND exposes a quick-insert button next to the comment input. Live preview test: fresh TEST_i10ui user → /discovery shows 24 real-user cards, zero seed names/avatars → /feed compose a post → expand comments → quick-insert appends 'Nice! 🥏' correctly (both empty and non-empty cases) → post the comment → tap the per-comment Nice button → count appears as '(1)' with aria-pressed=true → tap again → count chip is removed and aria-pressed=false. All optimistic UI behaviors observed; no console errors.
